items.title: Draft IC extended email for Octane covering founder profile, cap table, and competitive analysis
items.context: Email from stephanie@fin.capital on May 6: 'Can you help me draft an email to IC extended in advance of the weekend. I want to get a feel for Logan's comfort with founder profile and cap table before doing too much.'

items.title: Assess Octane's competitive landscape and comp analysis thoroughness
items.context: Email from stephanie@fin.capital on May 6: 'I've not assessed their competitors in much detail to assess how thorough their comp analysis is. Let me know what you think.'

items.title: Follow up with Roy (Orchid) in 2 weeks for round and term sheet update
items.context: Email from roy@orchid.security on May 6: 'We passed on a TS this week as the terms didn't align with our backers, but I'm expecting a few more to crop up in the coming weeks. Travel over the next two weeks will slow things down.'

items.title: Discuss internally whether to preempt VanishID round given strong Q1 results
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on May 4: Q1 FY27 new ARR of $1.17M (148% of forecast), ending ARR $5.92M, 125% YoY growth, 136% NRR. Matt asked on Apr 28: 'Are you interested in preempting?'

items.title: Keep tracking VanishID lead search progress for syndicate participation
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on May 1: 'I am focused on finding a lead and will keep you posted.' Derek replied expressing continued interest in participating as syndicate.

items.title: Debrief internally after RC and DW founder meeting with Blast Security
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital // Blast Security' on May 4 with boris@blast.security, Richie, and Derek — founder meeting has occurred, follow-up discussion needed.

items.title: Follow up with Rein Security after Derek's intro meeting on May 1
items.context: Email thread from Apr 30-May 1: Jake said 'I wanted to find some time for you to meet my colleague Derek.' Meeting confirmed for May 1 at 11:30am with matan@reinsec.io.

items.title: Prep for NTT Data <> Fin Capital catch-up meeting
items.context: Calendar event 'Catch-up: NTT Data <> Fin Capital' on May 7 at 1:00 PM PT with Yanni Zhou and Kousuke Mitsuoka from NTT Data — strategic partner quarterly check-in.

items.title: Prep for Hitachi Ventures <> Fin Capital catch-up meeting
items.context: Calendar event 'Catch-up: Hitachi Ventures <> Fin Capital' on May 8 at 9:30 AM PT with Gayathri from Hitachi Ventures — LP/strategic partner meeting.

items.title: Prep for U.S. Bank Quarterly Leadership Call on May 11
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital & U.S. Bank | Quarterly Leadership Call' on May 11 at 12:00 PM PT with 25+ attendees from U.S. Bank and Fin Capital leadership — major LP quarterly review.

items.title: Prep for Fairplay quarterly portfolio check-in on May 8
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams (Quarterly): Fin Capital <> Fairplay [ZOOM]' on May 8 at 11:00 AM PT with Kareem Saleh — portfolio company quarterly update.
